message:
feat: add ChatGPT connector and simplify Gemini connector

Expand agent detection coverage with a new ChatGPT connector and
refactor the Gemini connector:

- NEW src/connectors/chatgpt.rs (1683 lines): full connector for
  OpenAI ChatGPT conversation exports, supporting both JSON export
  format and API-style conversation logs with tool use and image inputs
- src/connectors/gemini.rs: simplify detection logic, removing 29 lines
  of redundant path probing in favor of the shared franken_detection helper
- src/connectors/mod.rs: register chatgpt module
- src/lib.rs: export ChatGptConnector in public API

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
